rationale: Both reviews identify the exact same real naming issue (mapValue and its *_* lemmas at the one relevant definition) with the same justification grounded in the diff and Mathlib patterns, and both would cause the author to perform an essentially equivalent rename. The only difference is the contested stylistic suggestion for the replacement name (Review 1's map/postcomp family vs. Review 2's compRight); reasonable maintainers would not insist on one over the other, so the resulting merged PRs are equally good.
